stimulus: Chilean filmmaker Patricio Guzmán’s acclaimed documentary work includes Nostalgia for the Light, a meditation on memory and astronomy filmed in the Atacama ______blank a poetic essay on water and political violence in southern Chile; and The Cordillera of Dreams, his award-winning study of the Andes.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the punctuation of items in a complex series with internal punctuation. The semicolon after "Desert" separates the first item ("Nostalgia for the Light...Desert") from the second ("The Pearl Button...Chile"), matching the semicolon used later before "and." The comma after "The Pearl Button" correctly separates the title from its supplementary descriptive phrase.

Choice A is incorrect because the comma after "Desert" does not match the semicolon used later in the series. Choice B is incorrect because the comma after "Desert" does not match the later semicolon, and a colon cannot separate a title from its descriptive supplementary phrase here. Choice C is incorrect because it omits the comma needed to separate the title from the supplementary phrase that describes it.
